title: Tempus Cobbled
description: A Cobblemon Modpack with some extra content designed for use in both Singleplayer and the Tempus Cobbled Survival Server
body:
# Welcome to Tempus Cobbled!

This modpack aims to bring together some of the best quality additions to Cobblemon as well as some addition building mods to spice up your creativity. This modpack functions in both Singeplayer and on the Tempus Cobbled Survival Server.

## Current Server Features include:
- Expanded Cobbledex (Adding many mons not yet present in base Cobblemon)
- Teams, Ranks and complete integration with Journeymap
- Questing System using Heracles (W.I.P)
- Waystones for easy fast travel
- Random Teleport
- Crates
- Additional Cobblemon Cosmetics and Costumes
- Player Gyms (W.I.P)
- Cobblemon Fishing
- Legendary Spawn Events
- Pokemon Outbreaks
- Traveller's Backpacks
- Pokemon Towns complete with Pokecenters
- Pokedollars and Merchants to buy items from
- Cobblemon GTS
- Cobbledex
- Cobblemon Hunts
- Pokenav
- Integrations with [Cobblemon Tools](https://cobblemon.tools/teams) and [Cobblemon Extras](https://cobblemonextras.com/showcase/661274d164f249a9d81392b8)
- Capture Chaining, Mounts, Breeding and more!
